sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32545" key="e(kousio/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑκουσιότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n32545.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">willingness,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1496.tlg001:32:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Memn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
